top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says these 'Pavlovian trades' are the stocks that benefit when oil spikes
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said investors have gravitated toward a familiar group of stocks as oil prices climb.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Deutsche Bank May Win Russia-Sanctions Lawsuit Against Linde
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank AG may win a legal battle in a dispute with a corporate client over who has to pick up the tap for losses linked to sanctions on Russia, according to a German court.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US industrial base is becoming stronger for wartime production, study finds
top_signals.summary: As recent conflicts consume weapons at a ferocious rate, America’s defense industrial base is becoming more prepared to sustain a major war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OPEC Cuts Demand Forecast Again as the Oil Market Starts Looking Past Hormuz
top_signals.summary: OPEC has trimmed its 2026 global oil demand growth forecast for the third straight month, even as crude production rebounds across the Gulf and tanker traffic slowly returns to the Strait of Hormuz. In its monthly oil market report released Monday, OPEC lowered expected oil demand growth this year to 780,000 barrels per day, down another 190,000 bpd from last month's forecast. The producer group still expects stronger consumption than many other forecasters, including the International Energy Agency, and even raised its demand growth estimate for…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Former LASD deputy jailed for obstructing crypto ‘mogul’ Adam Iza extortion probe
top_signals.summary: A former LASD deputy was sentenced to 18 months in federal prison for lying about an Adam Iza extortion incident.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
top_signals.summary: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Global law firm launches MiCA compliance tool as crypto companies navigate new EU rules
top_signals.summary: Reed Smith’s Aquarius platform automates regulatory filings and legal workflows as demand for MiCA compliance tools grows across Europe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
